stages.concept:
# Unit 150: I wish + 가정법 과거완료 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **I wish + 가정법 과거완료**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I wish I **had studied** harder.
> 더 열심히 공부했더라면 좋았을 텐데. (실제: 열심히 못 했다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **I wish + 주어 + had p.p.** — 과거에 이루지 못한 소망 (후회)

> I wish I **had gone** to the party.
> 파티에 갔더라면 좋았을 텐데. (실제: 안 갔다)

> She wishes she **had not said** that.
> 그녀는 그 말을 하지 않았더라면 좋았을 텐데 (라고 생각한다).

> I wish I **had known** about it earlier.
> 더 일찍 알았더라면 좋았을 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 비교!

| I wish + | 의미 | 예시 |
|------|------|------|
| 과거동사 | 현재 소망 | I wish I were rich. (지금 부자면 좋겠다) |
| had p.p. | 과거 후회 | I wish I had been rich. (부자였으면 좋았을 텐데) |

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"I wish I (       ) bought that coat yesterday." (어제 저 코트를 샀더라면 좋았을 텐데.)
1. have
2. had ✅
3. has

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 'yesterday(어제)' 일어난 과거 사실에 대한 후회와 아쉬움을 나타내고 있으므로 'I wish + 가정법 과거완료(had p.p.
)'를 써서 'had bought'가 되어야 합니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: I wish + had p.p. = 과거에 대한 후회! 현재 소망(과거동사)과 잘 구별해야겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 150: I wish + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 괄호 안의 단어를 알맞은 형태로 바꾸어 가정법 과거완료 문장을 완성하시오.
I wish I (study) harder for the test.
> **정답** had studied

---

**02.** I wish she (come) to the party.
> **정답** had come

---

**03.** I wish I (bring) my camera.
> **정답** had brought

---

**04.** I wish I (not eat) so much.
> **정답** had not eaten (hadn't eaten)

---

**05.** I wish he (tell) me the truth.
> **정답** had told

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish I studied harder last semester.
(과거 후회 → 가정법 과거완료)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** studied → had studied

---

**07.** I wish she came to the party yesterday.
(과거 후회)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** came → had come

---

**08.** I wish I brought my umbrella this morning.
(과거 후회)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** brought → had brought

---

**09.** I wish I didn't eat so much at lunch.
(과거 후회)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** didn't eat → hadn't eaten

---

**10.** I wish he told me yesterday.
(과거 후회)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** told → had told

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
더 열심히 공부했으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish I harder.
> **정답** had studied

---

**12.** 그녀가 파티에 왔으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish she to the party.
> **정답** had come

---

**13.** 카메라를 가져왔으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish I my camera.
> **정답** had brought

---

**14.** 너무 많이 먹지 않았으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish I so much.
> **정답** hadn't eaten

---

**15.** 그가 진실을 말해 주었으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish he me the truth.
> **정답** had told

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
더 일찍 일어났으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish had I gotten up earlier
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / gotten / up / earlier

---

**17.** 그녀를 만났으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish had I met her
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / met / her

---

**18.** 우산을 가져왔으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish had I brought an umbrella
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / brought / an / umbrella

---

**19.** 그 영화를 봤으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish had I watched that movie
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / watched / that / movie

---

**20.** 더 열심히 연습했으면 좋았을 텐데.
I wish had I practiced harder
> **정답** I / wish / I / had / practiced / harder
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 150: I wish + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I wish we ______________________ at home last
Sunday.
have been
were
had been
be
> **정답** had been

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I wish I ____________________________ my
homework at that time.
had done
would do
can do
could do
> **정답** had done

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: The last problem was very hard, wasn't it?
B: Yes. I wish I _______________________________
the last problem.
solved
has solved
had solved
solve
> **정답** had solved

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Did you study hard for the test?
B: No. I wish I ____________________________
online games too long.
didn't play
played
haven't played
hadn't played
> **정답** hadn't played

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: She didn't believe what you said.
B: Yeah. I wish she __________________________
me.
had believed
didn't believe
believed
has believed
> **정답** had believed

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I ate too much pizza for lunch.
I wish I hadn't eaten too much pizza for lunch.
I wish I didn't eat too much pizza for lunch.
I wish I ate too much pizza for lunch.
I wish I had eaten too much pizza for lunch.
> **정답** I wish I hadn't eaten too much pizza for lunch.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I didn't study abroad when I was a kid.
I wish I hadn't studied abroad when I was a
kid.
I wish I studied abroad when I was a kid.
I wish I didn't study abroad when I was a kid.
I wish I had studied abroad when I was a kid.
> **정답** I wish I had studied abroad when I was a kid.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you bought the bag yesterday.
I wish you had bought the bag yesterday.
I wish you hadn't bought the bag yesterday.
I wish you bought the bag yesterday.
I wish you haven't bought the bag yesterday.
> **정답** I wish you hadn't bought the bag yesterday.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you didn't help me at that time.
I wish you helped me at that time.
I wish you hadn't helped me at that time.
I wish you didn't help me at that time.
I wish you had helped me at that time.
> **정답** I wish you had helped me at that time.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you missed the chance.
I wish you hadn't missed the chance.
I wish you missed the chance.
I wish you had missed the chance.
I wish you didn't miss the chance.
> **정답** I wish you hadn't missed the chance.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my father had forgiven me.
I wish he paid me for dinner.
I wish John took me to the party yesterday.
I wish my friend had driven me to the station.
> **정답** I wish John took me to the party yesterday.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I hadn't moved out quickly.
I wish I hadn't jumped off the wall yesterday.
I wish Kelly paid money for my meal last
Saturday.
I wish you hadn't had any problems at that
time.
> **정답** I wish Kelly paid money for my meal last Saturday.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I read that book before.
I wish she had been more careful.
I wish I had studied hard when I was young.
I wish the boy had been my student.
> **정답** I wish I read that book before.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish someone had found my cell phone.
I wish my brother did my homework for me.
I wish I had taken your advice last night.
I wish she drove me to Busan yesterday.
> **정답** I wish she drove me to Busan yesterday.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I had been much smarter when I was
young.
I wish Jenny came to my birthday party
yesterday.
I wish my family had a big SUV now.
I wish the boy had joined our club last year.
> **정답** I wish Jenny came to my birthday party yesterday.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
당신과 함께 있었다면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I'm with you all the time.
I wish I had been with you all the time.
I wish I was with you all the time.
I wish I am with you all the time.
> **정답** I wish I had been with you all the time.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 그 문제의 정답을 알았다면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I knew the answer to the question.
I wish I know the answer to the question.
I wish I will know the answer to the question.
I wish I had known the answer to the question.
> **정답** I wish I had known the answer to the question.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 작년에 이 과정을 마쳤으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I complete this course last year.
I wish I completed this course last year.
I wish I couldn't complete this course last
year.
I wish I had completed this course last year.
> **정답** I wish I had completed this course last year.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish we took the subway
last night.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** took → had taken

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wish I accept my friend's
advice then.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** accept → had accepted
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 150 I wish + 가정법 과거완료중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I'm sorry that I didn't learn English.
→ I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 I, had, learned, English

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
I'm sorry that I knew her secret.
→ I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 I, hadn't, known, her, secret

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I'm sorry that we didn't go to the concert together.
→ I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 together.
정답 we, had, gone, to, the, concert

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I wish I hadn't lost the book on my way home.
→ I'm sorry that  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  on
my way home.
정답 I, lost, the, book

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 어제 무대에서 연기를 잘했으면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) play, well
I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  on the stage
yesterday.
정답 he, had, played, well

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리가 지난 주에 박물관을 방문했으면 좋을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) visit, the museum
I wish  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  last
week.
정답 we, had, visited, the, museum

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
내가 어제 밤에 그 공포 영화를 보지 않았더라면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I didn't not see the horror movie last night.
→ I wish I  (     )  last
night.
정답 hadn't seen the horror movie

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
미리 저축을 좀 해 두었으면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I saved some money beforehand.
→ I wish I 
beforehand.
정답 had saved some money

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I  [wish]  I  [help]  [you]  [at]  [that]
[time.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 help → had helped

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I  [wish]  I  [took]  [the]  [subway]  [an]
[hour]  [ago.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 took → had taken

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 150: I wish + 가정법 과거완료 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I wish we ______________________ at the park last Sunday. have been were had been be
> 정답: had been

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I wish I ____________________________ my chores at that time. had done would do can do could do
> 정답: had done

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: The final question was very tricky, wasn't it?
B: Yes.
I wish I _______________________________ the final question. solved has solved had solved solve
> 정답: had solved

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Did you practice hard for the contest?
B: No.
I wish I ____________________________ watching TV too long.
didn't spend spent haven't spent hadn't spent
> 정답: hadn't spent

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: He didn't believe what you said.
B: Yeah.
I wish he __________________________ me. had believed didn't believe believed has believed
> 정답: had believed

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I ate too much cake for dessert.
I wish I hadn't eaten too much cake for dessert.
I wish I didn't eat too much cake for dessert.
I wish I ate too much cake for dessert.
I wish I had eaten too much cake for dessert.
> 정답: I wish I hadn't eaten too much cake for dessert.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that I didn't learn to swim when I was young.
I wish I hadn't learned to swim when I was young.
I wish I learned to swim when I was young.
I wish I didn't learn to swim when I was young.
I wish I had learned to swim when I was young.
> 정답: I wish I had learned to swim when I was young.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you sold the guitar yesterday.
I wish you had sold the guitar yesterday.
I wish you hadn't sold the guitar yesterday.
I wish you sold the guitar yesterday.
I wish you haven't sold the guitar yesterday.
> 정답: I wish you hadn't sold the guitar yesterday.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you didn't call me at that time.
I wish you called me at that time.
I wish you hadn't called me at that time.
I wish you didn't call me at that time.
I wish you had called me at that time.
> 정답: I wish you had called me at that time.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
I'm sorry that you missed the flight.
I wish you hadn't missed the flight.
I wish you missed the flight.
I wish you had missed the flight.
I wish you didn't miss the flight.
> 정답: I wish you hadn't missed the flight.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish my dad had forgiven me.
I wish she paid me for lunch.
I wish Tom took me to the concert yesterday.
I wish my friend had driven me to the airport.
> 정답: I wish Tom took me to the concert yesterday.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I hadn't moved away so quickly.
I wish I hadn't climbed the fence yesterday.
I wish Amy paid for my meal last Sunday.
I wish you hadn't had any difficulties at that time.
> 정답: I wish Amy paid for my meal last Sunday.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I read that article before.
I wish she had been more kind.
I wish I had practiced harder when I was young.
I wish the girl had been my partner.
> 정답: I wish I read that article before.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish someone had found my lost wallet.
I wish my sister did my chores for me.
I wish I had taken your suggestion last week.
I wish he drove me to Seoul yesterday.
> 정답: I wish he drove me to Seoul yesterday.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I wish I had been much braver when I was young.
I wish Amy came to my party yesterday.
I wish my family had a bigger house now.
I wish the boy had joined our team last year.
> 정답: I wish Amy came to my party yesterday.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
당신과 함께 여행했었다면 좋을 텐데.
I wish I'm traveling with you.
I wish I had traveled with you.
I wish I was traveling with you.
I wish I am traveling with you.
> 정답: I wish I had traveled with you.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 전화번호를 알았다면 좋을 텐데.
